<?php /* * This file is part of Psy Shell. * * (c) 2012-2026 Justin Hileman * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Psy\ExecutionLoop; use Psy\Shell; /** * Abstract Execution Loop Listener class. */ abstract class AbstractListener implements Listener { /** * {@inheritdoc} */ public function beforeRun(Shell $shell) { } /** * {@inheritdoc} */ public function beforeLoop(Shell $shell) { } /** * {@inheritdoc} */ public function onInput(Shell $shell, string $input) { return null; } /** * {@inheritdoc} */ public function onExecute(Shell $shell, string $code) { return null; } /** * {@inheritdoc} */ public function afterLoop(Shell $shell) { } /** * {@inheritdoc} */ public function afterRun(Shell $shell, int $exitCode = 0) { } }
